summary: Iteration 9: 4 improvements tested — Print Layout Fix, Telemetry Removal, Mobile Responsiveness, Last Login Tracking. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend feature requirements verified (100%). Full pass on every requirement.

features_verified.index_no_emergent_main_js: ✅ index.html contains NO emergent-main.js script tag
features_verified.index_no_posthog: ✅ index.html contains NO PostHog analytics script block
features_verified.login_updates_last_login: ✅ POST /api/auth/login updates last_login; GET /api/admin/users shows non-null last_login for admin ('Mar 20, 2026, 1:28 AM')
features_verified.admin_users_has_last_login_field: ✅ GET /api/admin/users returns last_login field in every user object
features_verified.user_mgmt_last_login_column_header: ✅ User Management table has 'Last Login' column header
features_verified.user_mgmt_never_for_no_login: ✅ testtech_ui, testtech_final, test_tech_iter8 all show 'Never' (italic) in Last Login column
features_verified.mobile_hamburger_in_dom: ✅ data-testid=mobile-menu-btn is present in DOM and visible on 390px viewport
features_verified.mobile_hamburger_opens_sidebar: ✅ Clicking hamburger changes sidebar class from '-translate-x-full' to 'translate-x-0' (sidebar opens)
features_verified.mobile_backdrop_closes_sidebar: ✅ Clicking backdrop overlay (aria-hidden=true, bg-black/50) restores '-translate-x-full' (sidebar closes)
features_verified.sidebar_hidden_initially_mobile: ✅ Sidebar starts with '-translate-x-full md:translate-x-0' — hidden on mobile, visible on desktop
features_verified.dashboard_md_ml_64: ✅ DashboardPage main#main-content has class 'md:ml-64 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-screen pt-14 md:pt-0'
features_verified.print_css_no_broken_rule: ✅ form.css @media print does NOT contain 'body > *:not(.c4k-print-root)' rule
features_verified.print_css_oig_page_break: ✅ form.css @media print: .c4k-form-root .oig has page-break-inside: avoid and break-inside: avoid
features_verified.print_css_aside_hidden: ✅ form.css @media print: aside has display: none !important
features_verified.no_hardcoded_localhost: ✅ No hardcoded localhost or 127.0.0.1 in /app/frontend/src/ files

critical_code_review_comments: login endpoint correctly uses update_one with $set to update last_login after authentication - this does NOT break token flow as token is created from user fetched before update, last_login is purely for display
user_to_dict() correctly includes last_login: user.get('last_login') — returns None when field doesn't exist (new users), frontend renders 'Never' for null values
Sidebar mobile approach is clean: hamburger z-[60] > backdrop z-40 > sidebar z-50 — correct stacking order prevents interaction issues
All 3 main page elements (Dashboard, IntakeForm, UserManagement) correctly use md:ml-64 and pt-14 md:pt-0 — fully consistent
Print CSS rewrite is clean: targeted selectors (aside, nav, .no-print, .action-buttons, .audit-log) instead of broad body-level rules. No blank page regression.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Existing records TEST-BATCH-001 (HP/EliteBook 840/In Stock) and UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (Dell/Latitude 5490/In Stock) confirmed present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 all features verified: (1) Telemetry removed: index.html has only standard React structure, no PostHog/emergent scripts, title='C4K Inventory System'. (2) Last Login: POST /api/auth/login updates last_login in MongoDB; GET /api/admin/users includes last_login; UserManagementPage shows formatted date or 'Never' with data-testid=last-login-{username}. (3) Mobile: hamburger (data-testid=mobile-menu-btn, fixed top-3 left-3, md:hidden) opens/closes sidebar with backdrop overlay; all pages use md:ml-64 + pt-14 md:pt-0. (4) Print CSS: no broken body-level rule; aside/nav/.action-buttons hidden; .oig has page-break-inside:avoid. Current DB: 4 users (admin, testtech_ui, testtech_final, test_tech_iter8); 2 computers (TEST-BATCH-001, UI-FORM-SAVE-001).
